name: Folding Stretcher (Two-Fold, M.S.)
shortDescription: Lightweight two-fold canvas stretcher, 150 kg capacity, folds flat for storage and transport.
longDescription: A lightweight folding stretcher built from thickened, breathable canvas over a steel-alloy frame, rated to carry 150 kg. Folds flat for compact storage in a vehicle, security room or first-aid station, and is easy to clean after use.

images.alt: Folding Stretcher (Two-Fold, M.S.) supplied by Expert Safety Solutions, Vadodara
